Sample label (sticker).Description: A standardized unique ID for the physical label. Consist of ku ID of field trip representative/leader/PI + sampling site (as local as possible) + collection date + incrementing integer.

QR Code.Description: An id for the physical QR code on the sample

Latitude.Accepted format: decimal degrees, max 2 digits, max 8 decimal points (-90 to 90)
Latitude.Description: The geographical origin of the sample as defined by latitude. The values should be reported in decimal degrees as precise as possible (max. 8 decimal points).

Longitude.Accepted format: decimal degrees, max 2 digits, max 8 decimal points (-180 to 180)
Longitude.Description: The geographical origin of the sample as defined by longitude. The values should be reported in decimal degrees as precise as possible (max. 8 decimal points).

Sample provider(s).Description: Unique KU id(s) of the person(s) responsible for the sample extraction, seperated by semicolon if multiple.

PI (KU ID).Description: KU id of the principal investigator responsible for the project.

Grant.Description: Specify the grant that funds the project.

Sampling depth (discrete, cm).Description: Depth measurement for discrete type samples (such as tube)

Sampling depth (interval, cm).Accepted format: Restricted mathematical notation of the form [<no>, <no>). Meaning only use "[" as the opening bracket and ")" as the closing bracket (decimals not allowed).
Sampling depth (interval, cm).Description: Depth measurement for interval type samples (such as core)

Sampling depth reference.Description: Point from where the depth measurement was taken

Correlation depth (bottom, cm).Description: The local core depth that correlates with the  correlation depth (top) of the core immediately above.

Correlation depth (top, cm).Description: The local core depth  that correlates with the  correlation depth (bottom) of the core immediately below.

Sample container.Accepted format: Mathematical notation: Numbers, "()", "[]" and "," (decimal allowed only if "." is used as decimal point).

Sediment type.Description:
Eg. Glacial, Lacustrine
Fluvial, Aeolian,Peat
Soil

Age Estimate (ka).Accepted format: Restricted mathematical notation of the form [<no>, <no>). Meaning only use "[" as the opening bracket and ")" as the closing bracket (decimals not allowed).

Height above mean sea level (meters).Description: Specify as negative number if below mean sea level.

Sample storage address.Description: The exact address where the sample. If it's stored at geological museum then you can just write "GM".

Sample storage location.Description: If working half and archive half are stored different places, report two locations seperated by semi-colon and preceded by either A: or W:

Storing date.Description: Report when the sample was stored in the specified storage location.

Disposal date.Description: Report when the sample was disposed.

Miscellaneous Sample Measurements or Obs.Description: Any relevant measurements/observations taken of the field sample. If multiple: seperate by semi-colon.

Miscellaneous Environmental Measurements.Description: Any other relevant environmental measurements/observations. If multiple: seperate by semi-colon.

Link to images.Description: Link to any relevant images of the sample.
